description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a flat roof and a simple, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are painted white, and the structure features multiple windows distributed across all sides, allowing for ample natural light. The front of the bungalow includes a covered carport and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is adorned with a trellis and some greenery. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and contains several mature trees, a hammock, and a small patio area. The property also features a garden bed along one side and a driveway adjacent to the carport. The overall design is functional and modern, with a focus on outdoor living spaces and accessibility.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, carport, fenced backyard, and multiple windows. Features include a trellis entry, garden, and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, main entrance with trellis, garden bed, and paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, garden bed, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, trees, hammock, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, trees, and the side of the carport with driveway access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
